description: Jaws Mustang Acquisition Corporation does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Miami Beach, Florida. Jaws Mustang Acquisition Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Mustang Sponsor LLC.
